ops.text:
RESULTS (E22 complete). PENDING-E15: CI-only, no verdict.

HEADLINE: auc_base=0.931690, auc_retrieval=0.926112, delta=-0.005578, ci95=[-0.017132, +0.005839], k=3, frame_n=628 (positives=335).

INSTRUMENT: base-arm nosteer_prob(tail) reproduces stored served probs EXACTLY — max abs diff = 0.0 across all 628 rows (not just the 5 smoke rows). Scoring instrument is faithful; the two arms differ only by the prepended retrieval block.

RETRIEVAL SANITY: index 3153 voyage-4-large rows (dim 1024), TRAIN-split only; frame_id/index_key overlap = 0 (no self-retrieval). MMR top_n=32 -> k=3, diversity=0.5. Smoke row0 MMR cosines 0.74-0.82, exemplar_block 6641 chars. Retrieved exemplars are real user steers (diffs + directions), prepended as HEADER + block + MOMENT + tail.

BOOTSTRAP (run.py seed=1729, B=2000, skipped_single_class=0): delta_ci95=[-0.017132,+0.005839], delta_mean=-0.005757, frac(delta>0)=0.1585. Per-arm: auc_base_ci95=[0.9114,0.9503], auc_ret_ci95=[0.9047,0.9453].

INDEPENDENT VERIFY (verify.py, fresh seed=20260719, B=5000): recomputed auc_base/ret/delta match summary to 1e-12; fresh delta_ci95=[-0.016443,+0.005382], mean=-0.005643, frac>0=0.1552. CI reproduces the run's within noise.

INTERPRETATION: CIPHER-style in-context retrieval of past corrections (no training) does NOT improve sentinel AUC. Point estimate is slightly NEGATIVE (-0.0056); 95% CI straddles zero; ~84% of resamples favor the base arm. Effect indistinguishable from zero, leaning marginally harmful. NO promote/kill verdict (E15 instrument card gates that).

SPEND: ~$0.40 (Voyage voyage-4-large query embeddings only: 628 queries x <=16000 chars ~ 2.5M tokens; smoke +1 query). Zero LLM-judge spend (scoring is local MLX watcher v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48, Qwen3-8B-4bit, render=2). Well under $5 cap.

ENV: installed voyageai==0.5.0 + python-dotenv into workspace .venv only (embed extra; additive; NOT the forbidden cc-steer/.venv). Prior attempt's inputs + run.py reused; prior run had died at scoring-loop start.

ARTIFACTS (kept at /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E22/out/): summary.json, scores.npz (ids/labels/p_base/p_ret/stored/boot_deltas/boot_ab/boot_ar), scores.jsonl (628 rows: per-row p_base/p_ret/stored/aug_chars/base_chars/retrieved-meta), run.log. Harness: run.py, smoke.py, verify.py.
